app.title: Brainwires Chat
chat.title: New chat
chat.empty: Start a conversation. Pick a provider, paste an API key in Settings, and say hello.
chat.modelNotReady: Local model not loaded — visit Settings to download Gemma 4 E2B.
chat.homeNotPaired: Home agent not paired — pair from Settings → Home agent.
settings.title: Settings
settings.localModel.title: Edge model — Gemma 4 E2B
settings.localModel.confirmDelete: Delete the downloaded model? This frees ~2.5 GB.
settings.passphrase.title: Passphrase
settings.passphrase.tooShort: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters
settings.passphrase.skipWarn: Without a passphrase, your API keys are stored in plaintext on this device. Anyone with access to the browser can read them.
settings.voice.title: Voice
settings.voice.unsupported: This browser doesn't support Web Speech recognition.
settings.rag.title: Private RAG (PDFs)
settings.rag.empty: No documents ingested yet. Upload a PDF or .txt to start using retrieval.
settings.rag.confirmDelete: Delete this document and remove its chunks from the index?
settings.mcp.title: MCP servers
settings.mcp.empty: No MCP servers configured. Add a Streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint URL above.
settings.mcp.name: Display name
mcp.picker.title: Tools
mcp.picker.empty: No tools advertised by this server.
mcp.picker.noServers: No MCP servers configured. Add one in Settings.
settings.about.title: About
settings.theme.title: Appearance
settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.label: Display language
settings.home.title: Home agent
settings.home.unpairConfirm: Remove paired device? You'll need to pair again to use the home agent.
settings.home.scanDesc: Run `brainwires-home pair` on your home machine, then scan the QR or paste the bwhome:// URL below.
settings.home.codeDesc: Enter the 6-digit confirm code shown on the home machine.
settings.home.scanUnsupported: Camera scanning is not available in this browser. Paste the bwhome:// URL above.
home.error.pairingExpired: Pairing expired — pair again from Settings
home.error.sessionReset: Home agent session reset — please retry your last message
settings.sync.title: Cross-device sync
settings.sync.help: When enabled, conversations and settings are synced to other paired devices through the home agent.
settings.sync.requiresPairing: Pair with a home agent first to enable sync.
download.error.network: Download failed — network error. Tap Retry.
download.error.storage: Download failed — storage error. Tap Retry.
download.hfTokenDesc: Gemma 4 is gated. Paste a HF read token (hf_…) — it's stored encrypted on this device only.
voice.unsupported: Speech recognition not supported in this browser
unlock.title: Unlock
unlock.firstRunDesc: Your API keys are encrypted on this device with a passphrase you choose. Lose it and you'll have to re-enter your keys.
unlock.unlockDesc: Enter your passphrase to unlock saved API keys.
error.unsupported: This browser doesn't support a required feature
error.noKey: Add an API key for this provider in Settings
error.locked: Unlock the app to use saved API keys
